args: while read line; do eval $line; done

tools.name: read_journalctl
tools.description: Reads the last 50 lines of systemd journal for a specific service. Requires service name.

service.description: The systemd service name, e.g., sshd, NetworkManager

tools.name: check_firewall
tools.description: Returns the active ruleset for firewalld.

tools.name: network_status
tools.description: Returns the current IP addressing and routing table.
